privacy.p: Through contact forms, quote requests and newsletter sign-ups we collect your name, email, phone and company details.
We use the information we collect only to respond to your request, deliver our services, and — with your consent — send you marketing updates.
We take industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information.
We do not sell or rent your information to third parties without your consent.
If you have any questions about privacy, contact us at hello@nuul.digital.

terms.p: Nuul Digital provides digital services such as web development, design, AI and automation on a contractual basis.
Project fees, schedules and terms are governed by the agreement made between the parties.
Intellectual property rights in delivered work transfer to the client once payment is made in full.
We strive to deliver our services to a high professional standard but are not liable for indirect damages.
If you have any questions about these terms, contact us at hello@nuul.digital.

domainRegistration.p: Nuul Digital acts as your agent to register, renew, and transfer domain names. Authoritative registry rights remain with registry.mn / NIC.MN.
You must provide accurate identity information and submit required documents within 3 business days of ordering. False information may result in cancellation.
Use, prohibited content, and dispute resolution for .mn domains are governed by official NIC.MN policy. See https://registry.mn
Domains are typically registered for 1 year. Renewal reminders are sent by email. Grace periods after expiry are defined by the registry.
No refunds after a domain has been successfully registered. If registration fails, we offer a full refund or an alternative domain name.
We aim to activate your domain within 24 hours of confirmed payment. We are not liable for delays caused by third-party registry systems.
For domain disputes or questions, contact hello@nuul.digital.
